SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2025 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2025 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-02-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. THE COURT CORRECTS THE COMPLAINT NUNC PRO TUNC TO NAME "THE PHARAOH/NOB HILL ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP" AS DEFENDANT AND DISMISSES DEFENDANT "SF NOB HILL ASSOCIATES LP" WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE PROPER DEFENDANT. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF KATHERINE CHAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SF NOB HILL ASSOCIATES LP IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
